Index.subtitle: DevCommons is an open platform where developers share their knowledge and code for free.
Index.no_barrier: A collection of open-source snippets and architectural solutions.
Index.bento_ai_prompt: "Write a universal custom hook for asynchronous data fetching in React.js."
Index.feat_desc: Make knowledge open. Grow with the community. Essential tools for every developer.
Index.feat1_desc: Ready-made solutions from real projects. Copy, use, and save time. Every snippet is tested code.
Index.feat2_desc: A collection of working prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. Share your own prompts too.
Index.feat3_desc: For everyone, to everyone. Junior or senior — your knowledge level doesn't matter, your contribution does.
Index.how1_desc: Find the snippet or prompt you need with quick search
Index.how2_desc: Copy the code with one click and add it to your project
Index.how3_desc: Add your own solutions — the community will evaluate them
Index.tech_desc: Snippets in JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust, and other languages
Index.cta_desc: The platform is growing as an open-source project. Authenticate via GitHub to submit your code.

Footer.description: Open knowledge base for developers. Share code snippets and AI prompts for free.

NewPrompt.field_desc_placeholder: What is this prompt for? What result does it give?
NewPrompt.field_content_placeholder:
Write your prompt here...

Example:
You are an experienced senior developer, please do code review. Explain each issue and suggest improvements...
NewPrompt.error_required: Title and prompt text are required!

Tour.welcome_desc: Welcome to the largest platform for developers in Uzbekistan. Let's take a quick tour.
Tour.snippets_desc: Here you can find ready-to-use code blocks for your daily work or share your own.
Tour.prompts_desc: Learn how to write the best prompts for ChatGPT and other AIs, and share them with the community.
Tour.profile_desc: Log in to save your favorite codes, follow friends, and create your personalized feed!
